payload.title: Diversity Committee Meeting

payload.claim_text: During 2024, MTA received 230 EEO complaints, citing 420 separate bases, and 24 lawsuits. 132 filed internal complaints. 122 filed external complaints including lawsuits. The most frequently cited bases internally was Race/Color.
payload.subject: MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: During 2024, MTA received 230 EEO complaints*, citing 420 separate bases, and 24 lawsuits. 132 filed internal complaints. 122 filed external complaints including lawsuits. The most frequently cited bases internally was Race/Color.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.claim_text: During 2024, MTA received 114 Title VI and Related complaints, citing 127 separate bases and no Title VI lawsuit. 83 Title VI complaints were filed. 31 Related discrimination complaints were filed. The most frequently cited bases was Race.
payload.subject: MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: During 2024, MTA received 114 Title VI and Related complaints, citing 127 separate bases and no Title VI lawsuit. 83 Title VI complaints* were filed. 31 Related discrimination complaints** were filed. The most frequently cited bases was Race.

payload.claim_text: RL Controls has earned over $18.5M with the MTA over the past five years but their history of working with the MTA dates back to 2012. Over the years RL Control has supplied the MTA with dozens of bus and railroad replacement parts, security and control equipment, sensors, gauges and so much more.
payload.subject: RL Controls

evidence_refs.source_quote: RL Controls has earned over $18.5M with the MTA over the past five years but their history of working with the MTA dates back to 2012.

payload.claim_text: Key Changes to Scope B: Rebrand SBDP to MTA EDGE (Expansion, Development, Growth and Equity); Added Contract Compliance staff; Flexibility in training courses; Develop Alumni Program; Establish Business Assistance Partnerships; Specific and quantified metrics of success.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • During 2024, MTA received 114 Title VI and Related complaints, citing 127 separate bases and no Title VI lawsuit. • 83 Title VI complaints* were filed. • 31 Related discrimination complaints** were filed. • The most frequently cited bases was Race.

payload.description: Seasoned mass transit system integrator, established in 1991 by principal owner Lena Walsh. Supplied MTA with bus and railroad replacement parts, security and control equipment.

evidence_refs.source_quote: RL Controls stands as a seasoned mass transit system integrator, boasting an impressive legacy of more than 30 years in the industry.

tool_args.label: Lena Walsh - Principal Owner, RL Controls

evidence_refs.source_quote: Lena Walsh Principal Owner
Established in 1991 by principal owner Lena Walsh

payload.description: MTA's first 5-year DEI Strategic Plan developed to comply with New York State Executive Order 187. Includes four goals, thirty strategies, and year-one actions.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Ms. Cockfield and Dr. Green reported on the year-one progress (July 1, 2023 – June 30, 2024) of the Five-Year DEI Strategic Plan. The report included four goals, thirty strategies, and year-one actions.

tool_args.label: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk - October 2024

payload.event_name: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk
payload.description: EWT led MTA participation in Making Strides for Breast Cancer Walk with two walk locations, MTA Breast Cancer Walk T-shirts, and partnership with other departments. Goal was to raise $30,000 and over $40,000 was raised.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk, October 2024 - Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) led the MTA's participation in the Making Strides for Breast Cancer Walk.

tool_args.label: Veterans Day Ceremony and Parade - November 2024

payload.description: Annual Veteran Day Ceremony to commemorate Armed Service Veterans. MTA Pipes and Drums, Color Guard participated. Veterans took part in NYC Veterans Day Parade.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Veteran ERG held their annual Veteran Day Ceremony to commemorate the service and sacrifice of our Armed Service Veterans.
